summary:
Mammography, Pap smear, and even aspirates can be part of routine gynecological exams or specific diagnostic procedures aimed at early detection; however, serum CA-125 is more indicative during follow-up rather than primary screening methods owing to lower efficacy standards set by medical guidelines.
```
```plaintext
The summary highlights three effective screening tools while clarifying why one particular biomarker isn't considered standard practice despite being related to certain malignancies detected through these established means.
``` To refine this further into two concise sentences:

Mammograms, Pap smears, and endometrial aspiration are reliable screening practices for various female cancers, whereas elevated CA-125 alone lacks sufficient utility as an initial screening method due to limited effectiveness.
Therefore, among options including those specifically named alongside CA-125, only CA-125 cannot serve directly as a general screening modality according to current best-practice recommendations. ```markdown Summary: Commonly accepted screening methods include mammograms for breasts, Pap smears for cervixes, and endometrial aspirations when necessary—CA-125血液标志物则不作为主要筛查手段，因其敏感性和特异性不足。 ```

This version ensures clarity within just under twenty words focusing solely on critical aspects pertinent to identifying which item doesn’t qualify broadly across typical preventive care measures outlined initially.

agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Mammography, Pap smear, and even aspirates can be part of routine gynecological exams or specific diagnostic procedures aimed at early detection; however, serum CA-125 is more indicative during follow-up rather than primary screening methods owing to lower efficacy standards set by medical guidelines.
```
```plaintext
The summary highlights three effective screening tools while clarifying why one particular biomarker isn't considered standard practice despite being related to certain malignancies detected through these established means.
``` To refine this further into two concise sentences:

Mammograms, Pap smears, and endometrial aspiration are reliable screening practices for various female cancers, whereas elevated CA-125 alone lacks sufficient utility as an initial screening method due to limited effectiveness.
Therefore, among options including those specifically named alongside CA-125, only CA-125 cannot serve directly as a general screening modality according to current best-practice recommendations. ```markdown Summary: Commonly accepted screening methods include mammograms for breasts, Pap smears for cervixes, and endometrial aspirations when necessary—CA-125血液标志物则不作为主要筛查手段，因其敏感性和特异性不足。 ```
